LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_Teseum.label: 12 gauge shell (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_Teseum.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Teseum.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting and riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Bullet_12Gauge_Teseum.label: buckshot pellet

LanguageData.Ammo_AriadnanChainGun.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Bullet_AriadnanChainGun.label: molten metal
